title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
